textByHash.ae2c44072891a36c561e61ee3e08cb7e5cea8fc5: Ah! Are you the outlander called ?
textByHash.ee5e2c8f0f18dc202727556f1ffa9537f24a35cb: The Burgher would like to talk to you urgently. Please talk to him right away.
textByHash.933fdd9ddf145826410107e1f7d7b93bac35c49b: Have you collected all the rope we need yet?
